results.title: NFHS make changes for some fall sports
results.description: With the fall sports season less than a month away, some changes have been made to rules by the National Federation of State High School Associations (NFHS) for spectators to be aware. Some of these notifications are new rules and some are just clarifications. Football Just a couple of things were adjusted for the 2026 high school football season. First, play cards may be worn on both the ...

results.title: Erling Haaland’s explosive speed: what runners can learn from Norway’s World Cup star
